title: Hard on Your Sin, Gentle With Your Brother
caption:
Most guys have it backwards. Soft on their own sin, sharp with everyone else's.

You know exactly how to explain away what you did. Try that same excuse on his sin and hear how thin it sounds. So interrogate your own excuses first. Extend him the doubt you never give yourself. Confess yours loud, correct his quiet, not the other way around.

"Why do you look at the speck in your brother's eye and pay no attention to the plank in your own?" (Matthew 7:3)

Jesus wept over a city before he ever flipped a table. A godly man leads with the same order, hard on himself, gentle with the guy next to him.

Save this and check yourself again on Friday.

#faith #christianmen #humility #brotherhood #godlymen #manofgod #scripture
theme: He's hard on himself, gentle with others.
